root:
<技能 編號="1" 名稱="Life" 介面="10501" 魔攻="4" 互斥1="2" 說明="Teaches you Life spells. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and cast Life spells /c* . Each successful spell casting yields spell exp for improving the spell. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Damage done by magical spells will be increased by 4 instantly after learning this spell. /c*" pt1="10" pt16="6" pt17="5" pt18="5" 生命法術="是"/> <技能 編號="2" 名稱="Wraith" 介面="10502" 魔攻="4" 互斥1="1" 說明="Teaches you Wraith spells. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and cast Wraith spells /c* . Each successful spell casting yields spell exp for improving the spell. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Damage done by magical spells will be increased by 4 instantly after learning this spell. /c*" pt2="10" pt16="6" pt17="5" pt18="5" 死靈法術="是"/> <技能 編號="3" 名稱="Chaos" 介面="10503" 魔攻="4" 互斥1="4" 說明="Teaches you Chaos spells. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and cast Chaos spells /c* . Each successful spell casting yields spell exp for improving the spell. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Damage done by magical spells will be increased by 4 instantly after learning this spell. /c*" pt3="10" pt16="6" pt17="5" pt18="5" 混亂法術="是"/> <技能 編號="4" 名稱="Earth" 介面="10504" 魔攻="4" 互斥1="3" 說明="Teaches you Earth spells. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and cast Earth spells /c* . Each successful spell casting yields spell exp for improving the spell. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Damage done by magical spells will be increased by 4 instantly after learning this spell. /c*" pt4="10" pt16="6" pt17="5" pt18="5" 大地法術="是"/> <技能 編號="5" 名稱="Curse" 介面="10505" 魔攻="2" 說明="Able to reduce the casting time of spells great deal. The spell rank can be upgraded by casting Life spells, Wraith spells, Chaos spell or Earth spells. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Damage done by magical spells will be increased by 2 instantly after learning this spell 
 Each time the spell rank goes up, damage done by magical spells increases by 1 /c*." pt1="1" pt2="1" pt3="1" pt4="1" pt16="1" pt17="1" pt18="1" 生命法術="是" 死靈法術="是" 混亂法術="是" 大地法術="是"/> <技能 編號="6" 名稱="Meditate" 介面="10506" 魔防="2" 心靈="2" 互斥1="12" 說明="Able to improve magical defense. The spell rank can be upgraded by casting Life spells, Wraith spells, Chaos spell or Earth spells. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Magical defense and fear resistance will be increased by 2 instantly after learning this spell 
. Each time the spell rank goes up, MP increases by 15 and magical defense increases by 1 /c*." pt1="1" pt2="1" pt3="1" pt4="1" pt16="1" pt17="1" pt18="1" 生命法術="是" 死靈法術="是" 混亂法術="是" 大地法術="是"/> <技能 編號="7" 名稱="Hit" 介面="10507" 魔攻="2" 說明="Able to increase magical power. The spell rank can be upgraded by casting Life spells, Wraith spells, Chaos spell or Earth spells. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Magical power will be increased by 2 instantly after learning this spell 
. Each time the spell rank goes up, MP increases by 5 amd magical power increases by 1 /c*." pt1="1" pt2="1" pt3="1" pt4="1" pt16="1" pt17="1" pt18="1" 生命法術="是" 死靈法術="是" 混亂法術="是" 大地法術="是"/> <技能 編號="8" 名稱="Staff Hit" 介面="10508" 攻擊="2" 魔攻="1" 魔防="1" 說明="Ablt to increase magical power and defense. The spell rank can be upgraded by casting Life spells, Wraith spells, Chaos spell or Earth spells. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Attack power increases by 2, magical power and magical defense increases by 1 after learning this spell 
. Each time the spell rank goes up, attack power, magical power and accuracy increases by 1 /c*." pt1="1" pt2="1" pt3="1" pt4="1" pt16="1" pt17="1" pt18="1" 生命法術="是" 死靈法術="是" 混亂法術="是" 大地法術="是"/> <技能 編號="9" 名稱="Sword" 介面="10509" 攻擊="4" 說明="Able to increase the attack power of swords. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and use sword skills /c* . The rank can be upgraded by attacking with swords. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Attack power will be increased by 4 instantly after learning this spell 
. Each time the spell rank goes up, both attack power and accuracy increases by 1 /c*." pt5="2" pt6="2" pt7="10" pt17="3"/> <技能 編號="10" 名稱="Axe" 介面="10510" 攻擊="4" 說明="Able to increase the attack power of axes. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and use axe skills /c*. The rank can be upgraded by attacking with axes. Attack power increases by 4 after learning this spell. 
 Each time the rank goes up, attack power increases by 1. 
 Accuracy increases by 8 each time the rank goes up by 10. /c*" pt5="2" pt6="10" pt7="2" pt17="3"/> <技能 編號="11" 名稱="Spear" 介面="10511" 攻擊="4" 說明="Able to increase the attack power of spears. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn and use spear skills. /c* The rank can be upgraded by attacking with spears. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Attack power increases by 4 after learning this spell. 
 Each time the rank goes up, attack power increases by 1. 
 Accuracy increases by 8 each time the rank goes up by 10. /c*" pt8="10" pt17="3"/> <技能 編號="12" 名稱="Enhance" 介面="10512" 防禦="2" 體質="2" 互斥1="6" 說明="Able to improve defense. The rank can be upgraded by using melee combat abilities. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Both defense and constitution increases by 2 instantly after learning this spell. 
 Each time the spell rank goes up, HP increases by 12 and defense increases by 1. /c*" pt5="1" pt6="2" pt7="1" pt8="1" pt17="1" 近程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="13" 名稱="Grapple" 介面="10513" 精準="4" 互斥1="18" 說明="Able to increase attack power. The rank can be upgraded by using melee combat abilities. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Accuracy increases by 4 instantly after learning this spell. 
 Each time the rank goes up, HP increases by 12, attack power and accuracy increases by 1. /c*" pt5="1" pt6="1" pt7="1" pt8="1" pt17="1" 近程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="14" 名稱="Shield" 介面="10514" 防禦="4" 說明="Able to improve defense. The rank can be upgraded by attacking with an equipped shield. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Defense is increased by 4 points, instantly after learning this spell. 
 Each time your rank goes up, your defense will also increase by 3 points. /c*" pt5="10" pt17="3" 近程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="15" 名稱="Reserve" 介面="10515" 攻擊="2" 說明="Able to increase attack power and accelerate SP accumulation. The rank can be upgraded by using melee combat abilities or ranged attack abilities. 

 Each time the spell rank goes up by 25, a SP Point will be yielded. /c#F4F4F4 As the rank goes up, the SP accumulation will be accelerated. /c*
/c#FFFFFF 
 Each time the rank goes up, attack power increases by 1. /c*" pt5="1" pt6="1" pt7="2" pt8="1" pt9="1" pt17="1" pt18="1" 近程攻擊="是" 遠程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="16" 名稱="Finesse" 介面="10516" 靈敏="4" 說明="Allows you to equip a two-handed weapon and increases attack speed. The rank can be upgraded by using melee combat abilities or ranged attack abilities. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Agility increases by 4 instantly after learning this spell. 
 Each time the rank goes up, agility increases by 1. 

 Can have a weapon equipped in off hand while equiping a sword, axe or hammer in main hand. 
 While the both hands are equipped with sword, axe or hammer, attack speed increases by 10%. 
 While having a bow equipped, attack speed increases by 10%. 
 While having a spear equipped, attack speed increases by 10%. /c*" pt6="1" pt7="1" pt8="1" pt9="1" pt17="1" pt18="1" 近程攻擊="是" 遠程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="17" 名稱="Longbow" 介面="10517" 攻擊="4" 說明="Able to increase the attack power of bows and stings. /c#F4F4F4 Allows you to learn bow skills. /c* The rank can be upgraded by attacking with ranged weapons. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Attack power increases by 4 after learning this spell. 
 Each time the rank goes up, attack power increases by 1. 
 Accuracy increases by 8 each time the spell rank goes up by 10. /c*" pt9="10" pt18="3"/> <技能 編號="18" 名稱="Snipe" 介面="10518" 攻擊="2" 互斥1="13" 說明="Able to increase ranged attack power. The rank can be upgraded by attacking with ranged weapons. /c#F4F4F4 As the rank goes up, the chance for interrupting spell casting will increase. /c*
/c#FFFFFF 
 Attack power increases by 2 instantly after learning this spell. 
...
 Each time the rank goes up, attack power increases by 1. /c*" pt9="1" pt18="1" 遠程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="19" 名稱="Eagle Eye" 介面="10519" 精準="2" 靈敏="2" 說明="Able to increase ranged attack accuracy and agility. The rank can be upgraded by attacking with ranged weapons. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Both accuracy and agility increase by 2 after learning this spell. 
 Each time the rank goes up, accuracy and agility increases by 1." pt9="1" pt18="1" 遠程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="20" 名稱="Collect" 介面="10520" 攻擊="3" 說明="Teaches you gathering skills. /c#F4F4F4 Must have a pair of gloves or robot equipped /c* to gather something. The skill can be improved by gathering something successfully. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 Attack power increases by 2 instantly after learning this skill. /c*" pt11="1" pt12="1" pt15="1" pt19="5" 採藥="是"/> <技能 編號="21" 名稱="Fishing" 介面="10521" 攻擊="3" 說明="Teaches you the fishing skills. /c#F4F4F4 You must have a fishing rod or robot equipped /c* to fish. The skill can be improved by catching something. 
/c#FFFFFF 
 your Attack power will increase by 2 points. instantly after learning this skill. /c*" pt12="1" pt15="1" pt19="5" 釣魚="是"/> <技能 編號="22" 名稱="Dig" 介面="10522" 攻擊="3" 說明="Teaches you mining skill. /c#F4F4F4 You must have a mining pick or robot equipped /c* to mine. The skill can be improved by after obtaining something by mining. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Your attack power will increase by 2 points, instantly after learning this skill." pt10="1" pt11="1" pt13="1" pt19="5" 挖礦="是"/> <技能 編號="23" 名稱="Lumber" 介面="10523" 攻擊="3" 說明="Teaches you lumbering skill. /c#F4F4F4 You must have an axe or robot equipped /c* to lumber. The skill can be improved after obtaining lumber. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Your attack power will increase by 2 points after learning this skill. /c*" pt10="1" pt13="1" pt19="5" 伐木="是"/> <技能 編號="24" 名稱="Mechanism" 介面="10524" 說明="Able to improve the attack and defense while driving a robot. The rank can be upgraded by using melee combat abilities, gathering, mining, lumbering or fishing skill 
/c#FFFFFF
 with a robot equipped. 
 Each time, the rank goes up, attack power increases by 1; both HP and defense increase by 3. /c*" pt10="1" pt11="1" pt12="1" pt13="1" pt15="1" pt19="1" 採藥="是" 釣魚="是" 挖礦="是" 伐木="是"/> <技能 編號="25" 名稱="Drive" 介面="10525" 負重="15" 說明="Teaches you to drive a robot. The rank can be upgraded by using melee combat abilities with a robot equipped, gathering, mining, lumbering or fishing. /c#F4F4F4 While driving a robot, cannot cast spell and the equipped weapon won't work either. /c*
/c#FFFFFF
 Each time the rank goes up, load ability increases by 15 
 with a robot equipped 
. Movement speed increases by 50% after equipping a robot. 
 Each time, the rank goes up, both accuracy and agility increase by 1. /c*" pt10="1" pt11="1" pt12="1" pt13="1" pt15="1" pt19="1" 採藥="是" 釣魚="是" 挖礦="是" 伐木="是"/> <技能 編號="26" 名稱="Weapon" 介面="10526" 防禦="3" 說明="Teaches you how to make weapons. The skill can be improved by making a weapon successfully. 
/c#FFFFFF
 It allows you to make swords, axes, hammers, bows, bullets, arrows and other weapons. /c*" pt10="10" pt20="5" 製作武器="是"/> <技能 編號="27" 名稱="Armor" 介面="10527" 防禦="3" 說明="Teaches you how to make armor. The skill can be improved by making an armor successfully. 
/c#FFFFFF
 It allows you to make heavy armor, light armor, gloves, helmets, shields and other armor. /c*" pt11="10" pt20="5" 製作防具="是"/> <技能 編號="28" 名稱="Sew" 介面="10528" 防禦="3" 說明="Teaches you how to make clothes. The skill can be improved by making clothes successfully. 
/c#FFFFFF
 It allows you to make robes, gloves, hats, cloaks, backpacks and other cloth armor. /c*" pt12="10" pt20="5" 裁縫="是"/> <技能 編號="29" 名稱="Technics" 介面="10529" 防禦="3" 說明="Teaches you technics. The skill can be improved aftery making products successfully by using this skill. 
/c#FFFFFF
 It allows you to make staves, ornaments, robot parts and other products. /c*" pt13="10" pt20="5" 工藝="是"/> <技能 編號="30" 名稱="Alchemy" 介面="10530" pt20="5" 煉金="是"/> <技能 編號="31" 名稱="Cook" 介面="10531" 防禦="3" 說明="Teaches you how to cook. The skill can be improved by cooking something successfully. 
/c#FFFFFF
 It allows you to cook foods with an additional ability bonus. /c*" pt15="10" pt20="5" 烹飪="是"/> <技能 編號="32" 名稱="Mantle" 介面="10532" 防禦="3" 靈敏="1" 負重="60" 互斥1="33" 互斥2="34" 說明="Allows you to wear Light armor. The skill can be improved by fighting. /c#F4F4F4 Your defense will increase by 3 points and your agility will increase by 1 point after learning this. 
 Each time your rank goes up your load ability will also increase by 60 points. /c*" pt9="1" pt10="1" pt11="1" pt12="1" pt13="1" pt15="1" pt18="3" pt19="1" pt20="1" 近程攻擊="是" 遠程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="33" 名稱="Garment" 介面="10533" 防禦="4" 負重="72" 互斥1="32" 互斥2="34" 說明="Allows you to wear heavy armors. The skill can be improved by fighting. /c#F4F4F4 The speed of shoot, gathering and spell casting will be reduced great deal. /c*
/c#FFFFFF
 Defense increases by 4 after learning this. 
 Each time the rank goes up, load ability increases by 72. /c*" pt5="1" pt6="1" pt7="1" pt8="1" pt17="3" 近程攻擊="是" 遠程攻擊="是"/> <技能 編號="34" 名稱="Vestment" 介面="10534" 防禦="2" 魔防="2" 負重="48" 互斥1="32" 互斥2="33" 說明="Allows you to wear cloth armor. Your rank can be upgraded by casting earth, shadow, chaos or life spells. 
/c#FFFFFF
 Both defense and magical defense increase by 2 points after learning this. 
 Each time your rank goes up your load ability will also increase by 48 points. /c*" pt1="1" pt2="1" pt3="1" pt4="1" pt16="1" 生命法術="是" 死靈法術="是" 混亂法術="是" 大地法術="是"/> <成長方式 __name__="生命法術" __value__="0x00000001"/> <成長方式 __name__="死靈法術" __value__="0x00000002"/> <成長方式 __name__="混亂法術" __value__="0x00000004"/> <成長方式 __name__="大地法術" __value__="0x00000008"/> <成長方式 __name__="近程攻擊" __value__="0x00000010"/> <成長方式 __name__="遠程攻擊" __value__="0x00000020"/> <成長方式 __name__="採藥" __value__="0x00000100"/> <成長方式 __name__="釣魚" __value__="0x00000200"/> <成長方式 __name__="挖礦" __value__="0x00000400"/> <成長方式 __name__="伐木" __value__="0x00000800"/> <成長方式 __name__="製作武器" __value__="0x00001000"/> <成長方式 __name__="製作防具" __value__="0x00002000"/> <成長方式 __name__="裁縫" __value__="0x00004000"/> <成長方式 __name__="工藝" __value__="0x00008000"/> <成長方式 __name__="煉金" __value__="0x00010000"/> <成長方式 __name__="烹飪" __value__="0x00020000"/>
